report_name: CIRO Issues Alert on Cybersecurity Risks Posed by Frontier Artificial Intelligence Models

identities.name: CIRO dealer members
identities.description: A class representing the Canadian investment and financial services firms who are members of the Canadian Investment Regulatory Organization (CIRO). These organizations are the intended audience of the cybersecurity alert regarding AI risks and are considered attractive targets for cybercriminals.

identities.name: Canadian Investment Regulatory Organization
identities.description: A Canadian regulatory organization that issued a cybersecurity alert to its members regarding the risks associated with frontier Artificial Intelligence (AI) models.
